decision_subject: order the next bounded authority-contract preparation route after R7, or preserve the current no-field block

r3.classification: authoritative for bounded S10R-006-R3-A symbolic method only

r5.classification: authoritative for bounded S10R-006-R5-A symbolic coupling rule only

r7.classification: authoritative for bounded S10R-006-R7-A symbolic corner-ownership rule only

exact_interval_replay.r5_endpoint_policy: each lane owns both endpoints of its own closed interval; open gaps are unowned
exact_interval_replay.r7_tie_policy: single successor owner label at the exact symbolic midpoint

proven_missing_authority.evidence: R7 labels each open gap symbolically but defines no gap-local u map, record-weight relation, B_v/C_L coupling relation, field sample, seam, join, or closure.
No approved record converts analytic H_1 = N3 endpoint identity into a physical seam, continuity rule, topology relation, or source correspondence.
The Blueprint permits Step 10 written decisions but does not order gap-to-field coupling and top/upright joining.

candidate_route_separation.route_a_scope: later preparation only of one separate bounded corner-gap-to-field coupling rule contract
candidate_route_separation.route_b_scope: later preparation only of one separate bounded top/upright join rule contract
candidate_route_separation.block_scope: preserve the current approved symbolic records and no-field block

recommendation.reason: R7 supplies deterministic symbolic owner labels over the four gaps while R5 supplies B_v/C_L coupling only over the four separated owned lanes; the smallest unresolved adjacency is their missing symbolic connection.
recommendation.countercondition: R8-B and R8-BLOCK remain valid unselected candidates. Flamestrike alone selects the route.

execution_failure.failed_subject: output and handoff visibility are verified before the mandatory stop
execution_failure.fallback: mandatory BLOCK fallback applied without redesigning or selecting a route
